title: Onchain Agents Hackathon: Build for Real World Payments & Everyday Applications
summary: Build payments and everyday applications on Celo using robust agentic tooling and infrastructure. Compete for a $5K prize pool distributed in CELO. Winning agents generate real onchain transactions and demonstrate genuine utility.

submissionFields.label: Twitter/X registration post link
submissionFields.helpText: Link to your public X/Twitter post announcing or registering your hackathon submission.
